textByHash.5b36185cdae0c6f39e190df41678673c7f36e267: Ha, well I'm retired now, but in my heyday I was quite the expert fisherman! These days I just help out around the village where I can, my old bones don't allow me to do any more than that.
textByHash.173e70b3902d21891fe9891a993b6ea846c050d9: Bwana, if anyone else asks me that question today, I'll explode! Go and ask someone else!
textByHash.dfc5f8174638da087b660127a73d91ae5a58dd41: Not that I'm aware of, just sit back and enjoy the sunshine bwana!
textByHash.5d96f9a2465c5cc64bea4eda05d7de0b7aa55e0d: Well, I think that there's some work to be done...perhaps Murcaily can help you. He usually tends to the hardwood grove to the east of Trufitus's hut.
textByHash.e72a1f6c928e838d992ec85e0180fb7f7144e537: It's just village life as normal around here Bwana, always something interesting to find to occupy your time if you look hard enough.
textByHash.33f92233a6d7ddb6ff0b03d9edb1c6a96dfbbee0: Sorry Bwana, I'm already busy, why not go and talk to Murcaily! He's around the village somewhere.
textByHash.1245a27f66f163896c938c0214f704a5d04224d1: Hello there...thanks for helping out Trufitus commune with the gods Bwana. We've been able to return to the village thanks to your help.
textByHash.91a3d2f5151113a19a0e2ad6baff978959ee3c32: Yeah, you've been doing a lot of good work around here. Let me give you something for your time and effort.
textByHash.b83d3464c69329161796f8656b2d211eb243f377: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?
textByHash.5a325a16fb45cd32a622307ce68e177cd3e3b0e6: Ahhhhhhhh - Get away from me you beast!
textByHash.11e2876e9377ff11371b847dbb06d46c68585c41: Waahhhhh! - It's da evil broodoo beast come ta eat my very soul!
